title: Televator
description: A server-side elevator mod for Fabric using Polymer library
body:
This mod adds a block you can place one above the other at a configurable vertical distance(for now in code), and jump/crouch on top of the block to go in between the different heights.

Based on [JumpVader](https://modrinth.com/mod/jumpvader) by [StimzRx](https://modrinth.com/user/StimzRx)
